subcodes.first_line: O servants of God and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! The morn of guidance hath dawned, and the lamp of supreme bounty shineth with radiant light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی و کنیزان رحمانی صبح هدی ظاهر است و شمع موهبت کبری باهر نور
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
